title: Umsothis may be nothing
wikitext:
[]: Um...so...this may be nothing. Post by JP » Sun Dec 30, 2007 2:18 pm http://www.evangelion-not-end.ru/content/view/552/113/# Anyone speak russian?

[]: Post by EvaCub » Sun Dec 30, 2007 2:35 pm thats Cthulu's site

[]: Post by The Imperialist » Sun Dec 30, 2007 2:37 pm It is saying that you can upload the Rebuild of Evangelion from their site, but without any subtitiles- completely raw.

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sun Dec 30, 2007 2:40 pm damn it, no subtitles! somebody send in the fansubbers NOW!!!! but hey, give the Japanese credit maybe the copyright hounds over here could learn a thing or two from this RIDICULOUSLY long, God, how long, nearly THREE MONTHS before it hits the intrawebz

[]: Post by The Imperialist » Sun Dec 30, 2007 2:47 pm SHould I call in the National Police Agency, and the Naikaku Jōhō Chōsashitsu? Still, I don't know exactly which buttons to press.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 30, 2007 2:47 pm Khairax should make the actual DVD label look like that.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 30, 2007 3:08 pm It's still just the second half, right?

[]: Post by The Imperialist » Sun Dec 30, 2007 3:10 pm It may be. I forgot.

[]: Post by kasuturo » Sun Dec 30, 2007 3:22 pm NAveryW wrote: It's still just the second half, right?

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 30, 2007 3:32 pm People please decide where they want to concentrate posts about Webuild camrips.

[]: Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sun Dec 30, 2007 6:41 pm For any foreign language site you go on, if you want to go onto it, just translate it onto Google. Simple. I might give it a try and download it, since over 4000 people have already.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 30, 2007 8:28 pm Shifting camrip chatter here.
